free_text: Constraining the S factor of 15N(p,g)16O at
9.5 +/- 0.4 and 24.8 +/- 0.5 keV thick at Ep=429 keV.
The gamma rays at Notre Dame were observed
using a HPGe clover detector, which consists of four
HPGe crystals contained in the same cryostat.
At LUNA, a single-crystal, 115% HPGe detector was used.
